series_metadata.series_title: Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) - Strategic Plan
series_metadata.series_description: AAAs 4 year Strategic Plans through which the AAAs review needs of older Ohioans within their regions, identify resources to meet those needs, identify any gaps of services and how to meet and close those gaps indentified. File includes - Needs Asseessment, the annual Operational Elements, Goals & Objectives and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current plan and 1 prior plan in office for 4 years after end of strategic plan period then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain current plan and 1 prior plan in office for 4 years after end of strategic plan period then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
